creator: stannous@gmail.com
text:
After upgrading to 7.2, VLC no longer seems to be able to transcode without 
issuing warning messages:

-------------------------
[00000403] main mux warning: late buffer for mux input (149596)
[00000403] main mux warning: late buffer for mux input (125985)
[00000403] main mux warning: late buffer for mux input (102000)
[00000403] main mux warning: late buffer for mux input (78307)
[00000403] main mux warning: late buffer for mux input (54570)
[00000403] main mux warning: late buffer for mux input (30949)
[00000403] main mux warning: late buffer for mux input (6965)
[00000393] stream_out_transcode stream out debug: late picture skipped (283610)
[00000393] stream_out_transcode stream out debug: late picture skipped (252324)
[00000393] stream_out_transcode stream out debug: late picture skipped (203695)
[00000393] stream_out_transcode stream out debug: late picture skipped (171721)
-------------------

The picture is no longer viewable.

Fix: 

Not sure.  Perhaps some buffering configuration changed from
FreeBSD 7.1 to 7.2 and there is some setting that can alter this.
How-To-Repeat: Upgrade to FreeBSD 7.2 and use the vlc package
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-7-stable/Latest/vlc.tbz

VLC was started like this:

vlc -vvv -I dummy  udp://@239.245.0.1:1010  --sout '#transcode{vcodec=mp4v,vb=1024,scale=1.0,acodec=mpga,ab=128,channels=2}:duplicate{dst=std{access=udp,mux=ts,dst=10.10.10.10:1234}}'
